category_title: Adolescents with ASD exhibiting attention-seeking out-of-seat and assaultive behaviors
scenario_title: Morning academic lessons and difficult tasks
minimal_context: Brian is working with his teacher during morning lessons to complete five academic programmes while his peers are present at their tables.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Brian, it is time for our morning lessons. We need to work successfully through these five academic programmes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stops working on the difficult task and leaves the table without permission)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please sit back down and keep trying.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks to the door, looking back to see if the teacher is watching) I made the wrong choice.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We have to finish the programmes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Approaches a peer at their table and exhibits physically abusive behaviour against them)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Brian, it is time for our morning lessons. We need to work successfully through these five academic programmes.

STUDENT: (Stops working on the difficult task and leaves the table without permission)

TUTOR: Please sit back down and keep trying.

STUDENT: (Walks to the door, looking back to see if the teacher is watching) I made the wrong choice.

TUTOR: We have to finish the programmes.

STUDENT: (Approaches a peer at their table and exhibits physically abusive behaviour against them)

task.content: work successfully through five academic programmes

context.environment: school setting at The Jigsaw CABAS® School
context.materials: behaviour contract, computer for preferred activities
context.social_setting: peers present at their tables, working with his teacher
context.time_context: morning lessons (reported as minutes per morning session where total possible time was 160 minutes)

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: leaving the table without permission, walking to the door, and exhibiting physically abusive behaviour against another person

behavior_patterns.condition: at any time during his morning lessons
once the behaviour contract was implemented
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: initial increase in assaults to 25 in one session
